sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n31870" key="e)kdiafo/rhsis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐκδιαφόρ-ησις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n31870.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">dissipation,</tr_> ib.<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg4015.tlg009:157:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">157.2</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
